title: Analyze clunger restart logs for issue #53

log.context: Analyze clunger restart logs for issue #53

Investigation complete. Here's what was found:

**The "4 restarts" framing was wrong — there were ~60+ stop/start cycles in 24h**, but most were intentional deploys correlated with 38 git commits during an active development session. The issue stays open because there were **5 genuine crashes** in two categories:

**Category A — Unhandled API 400 crashes (3x, ~17:54–17:55 UTC Mar 25)**
